metadata.description: Generate Google Play Store mockup screenshots and Feature Graphics from any local codebase — without leaving the terminal

plugins.name: snap-mock-skill
plugins.description: Point at a local project directory, get 6 ready-to-export Play Store mockup screenshots (1080×1920 PNG) plus a 1024×500 Feature Graphic — gradient backgrounds, device frames, AI-written marketing copy, and in-device screen renders generated from your real source code. Powered by Claude + headless Chromium + Konva. Bundles its own Next.js renderer; no other repo required.
